personalization_note.behavior: Personalize greeting and tone if name matches, but NEVER block the conversation flow. If name doesn't match, proceed normally.

duplications.description: BMC_Base_Conocimiento_GPT-2.json exists in 12 copies across 2 repos
duplications.size_discrepancy: GPT-PANELIN copies: 16,363 bytes | Truth-base copies: 9,696 bytes — DIFFERENT VERSIONS
duplications.recommendation: Keep ONE canonical copy in Calculadora-BMC-GPT. Delete all others.
Deprecate — calculator API is now the source of truth for pricing

duplications.description: PANELIN docs duplicated across repos with different versions

duplications.differences: GPT version is newer (v1.1.0), has error handling schema, concise descriptions. Calc version has more detail but is older.
duplications.recommendation: Calculadora-BMC-GPT version should be canonical. Sync Calculadora-BMC version from it.

locations.ChatBOT: 5 workflow files (WF_* format, different naming, more evolved)

duplications.recommendation: ChatBOT WF_* workflows are the most evolved. Archive others.

duplications.recommendation: Clean up nested dirs. Keep only root-level files.
